column1: # Phase 3 — `\0` autoexec on /File Retrieve, gated by /WGD Default
# Other Autoexec. The harness stages a saved fixture with `\0`
# defined and checks that retrieving it auto-runs the macro.
# Build the fixture in this session, save it, then retrieve it in
# the same session — exercises the named-range round-trip plus the
# Stash a macro at A1 that types "auto-ran" into B5.
# /File New to wipe the in-memory workbook (so the retrieve really
# does load fresh state and the autoexec must come from the file).
# Autoexec is on by default; retrieve fires \0.
